name: Election to Treat Nonresident Alien Spouse as Resident

eligibility.description: Both spouses must make the election; the nonresident alien must be married to a U.S. citizen or resident at the close of the taxable year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a nonresident alien married to a U.S. citizen or resident to be treated as a U.S. resident for tax purposes, enabling the couple to file a joint return.
